mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_attendance_rule (rule_name, start_time, end_time, late_minutes, early_minutes, work_days, radius, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{ruleName}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{lateMinutes}, #{earlyMinutes}, #{workDays}, #{radius}, 1, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE t_attendance_rule SET rule_name = #{ruleName}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, late_minutes = #{lateMinutes}, early_minutes = #{earlyMinutes}, work_days = #{workDays}, radius = #{radius}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_attendance_rule WHERE status = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM t_attendance_rule ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
